DERIVE p0 BY h3 FROM p2

train/relation_composition/action.source_text:

FACT r1 e0 e2

RULE r4 = r3 ; r1

FACT r1 e1 e0

STATE

train/relation_composition/repair_action.source_text:

RULE r4 = r3 ; r1

train/relation_composition/verify.source_text:

STATE

DERIVE r4 e3 e2 VIA e0
